title: Adobe camera app's new feature will critique your photos using AI | TechCrunch
summary: Adobe is adding new AI-powered features to its experimental iOS camera app called Project Indigo, launched last year . Photography apps, including Apple Photos, Google Photos, and Adobe Photoshop, have offered object removal for years.
